sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Share2, Gift, Users, DollarSign, Copy, CheckCircle, Star, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; import { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext'; const ReferralPage = () => { const { t } = useLanguage(); const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const [selectedTab, setSelectedTab] = useState('overview'); const referralCode = 'SWIFT123'; const referralLink = `https://swiftfixpro.com/ref/${referralCode}`; const stats = [ { title: t('referralCount'), value: '12', icon: Users, color: 'bg-blue-500' }, { title: t('rewardEarned'), value: 'SGD $240', icon: Gift, color: 'bg-green-500' }, { title: t('pending'), value: '3', icon: CheckCircle, color: 'bg-yellow-500' }, { title: t('totalEarnings'), value: 'SGD $480', icon: DollarSign, color: 'bg-purple-500' } ]; const rewards = [ { level: 1, requirement: t('referralLevel1'), reward: 'SGD $20', status: 'completed' }, { level: 2, requirement: t('referralLevel2'), reward: 'SGD $50', status: 'completed' }, { level: 3, requirement: t('referralLevel3'), reward: 'SGD $100', status: 'in-progress' }, { level: 4, requirement: t('referralLevel4'), reward: 'SGD $200', status: 'locked' } ]; const referrals = [ { id: 1, name: '张先生', date: '2024-01-15', status: 'completed', reward: 'SGD $20' }, { id: 2, name: '李女士', date: '2024-01-12', status: 'completed', reward: 'SGD $20' }, { id: 3, name: '王先生', date: '2024-01-10', status: 'pending', reward: 'SGD $20' } ]; const tabs = [ { id: 'overview', name: t('overview') }, { id: 'rewards', name: t('rewardLevels') }, { id: 'referrals', name: t('referralHistory') } ]; const handleCopyLink = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(referralLink); setCopied(true); toast.success(t('referralLinkCopied')); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); } catch (err) { toast.error(t('copyFailed')); } }; const handleShare = () => { if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: t('swiftFixProTitle'), text: t('shareText'), url: referralLink }); } else { handleCopyLink(); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

{t('referralProgram')}

{t('inviteFriends')} {t('earnRewards')} {t('recommendOneFriend')} {t('youWillEarn')} {t('cashReward')}.

{/* Stats */} {stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.value}
{stat.title}
))}
{/* Main Content */} {/* Referral Link */}

{t('yourReferralLink')}

{/* How It Works */}

{t('howItWorks')}

1

{t('shareLink')}

{t('shareLinkDescription')}

2

{t('friendRegisters')}

{t('friendRegistersDescription')}

3

{t('earnReward')}

{t('earnRewardDescription')}

 {/* Sidebar */} {/* Rewards Info */}

{t('rewardInfo')}

{t('baseReward')}
{t('baseRewardDescription')}
SGD $20
{t('additionalReward')}
{t('additionalRewardDescription')}
SGD $50-200
{t('friendDiscount')}
{t('friendDiscountDescription')}
{t('friendDiscountValue')}
{/* Quick Stats */}

{t('quickStats')}

{t('referralsThisMonth')} 5 {t('people')}
{t('earningsThisMonth')} SGD $100
{t('totalReferrals')} 12 {t('people')}
{t('totalEarnings')} SGD $240
{/* Tips */}

{t('recommendationTips')}

{t('shareExperience')}
{t('recommendToFriends')}
{t('shareSpecificCases')}
{t('remindToUseCode')}
{/* Tabs Section */}
{/* Tab Navigation */}
{tabs.map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* Tab Content */}
{selectedTab === 'overview' && (

{t('referralOverview')}

{t('referralProgress')}

{rewards.map((reward) => (
{t('level')} {reward.level}
{reward.requirement}
{reward.reward}
{reward.status === 'completed' ? t('completed') : reward.status === 'in-progress' ? t('inProgress') : t('notStarted')}
))}

{t('recentReferrals')}

{referrals.slice(0, 3).map((referral) => (
{referral.name}
{referral.date}
{referral.reward}
{referral.status === 'completed' ? t('completed') : t('pending')}
))}
)} {selectedTab === 'rewards' && (

{t('rewardLevels')}

{rewards.map((reward) => (

{t('level')} {reward.level}

{reward.status === 'completed' ? t('completed') : reward.status === 'in-progress' ? t('inProgress') : t('notStarted')}
{reward.requirement}
{reward.reward}
))}
)} {selectedTab === 'referrals' && (

{t('referralHistory')}

{referrals.map((referral) => ( ))}
{t('referrer')} {t('registrationDate')} {t('status')} {t('reward')}
{referral.name} {referral.date} {referral.status === 'completed' ? t('completed') : t('pending')} {referral.reward}
)}
); }; export default ReferralPage;
